---
title: "ENVS 193DS Final"
date: "6/4/26" 
author: "Steven Le"
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: true 
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: source
include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
---

# Homework set up

```{r}

#read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggeffects)
library(flextable)
library(here)

```

# Problem 1. Research writing 

## a.



## b.



## c.



# Problem 2. Data analysis 

## a.



## b.



## c.



## d.



## e.



## f.



## g.



## h.



## i.



## j.



## k.



# Problem 3. Affective and exploratory visualizations 

## a.



## b.



## c.



## d.



## e.



## f.



## g.
